title: systemtap bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[5.3-3.0.1]
- set kernel name to kernel-uek if detected uek booting [OraBug: 29033323]

[5.3-3]
- RHEL-90805: Update dev.stp tapset to handle RHEL-9.7 kernels.

[5.3-2]
- RHEL-RHEL-89809: stap-server log owned by root

[5.3-1]
- Upstream release, see wiki page below for detailed notes.
  https://sourceware.org/systemtap/wiki/SystemTapReleases
full_text:
[5.3-3.0.1]
- set kernel name to kernel-uek if detected uek booting [OraBug: 29033323]

[5.3-3]
- RHEL-90805: Update dev.stp tapset to handle RHEL-9.7 kernels.

[5.3-2]
- RHEL-RHEL-89809: stap-server log owned by root

[5.3-1]
- Upstream release, see wiki page below for detailed notes.
  https://sourceware.org/systemtap/wiki/SystemTapReleases

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20730.html
